title: pyrus dumosa
intro: Pyrus dumosa, also known as the Tibetan apricot or the Himalayan apricot, is a shrub or small tree native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pyrus dumosa include reducing fever, alleviating coughs and colds, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of Pyrus dumosa are typically made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
